title: Just a Barrier Clear
description: make your barrier look more clear.
body:
**Just a Barrier Clear** - it's a very simple resource pack that replaces only one texture — the barrier block — and nothing else. The new texture will only be visible when you're holding the barrier in your hand.

This resource pack is mainly intended for creative players who don’t like the default large red barrier texture.

**What this resource pack is for and who it’s for:**

1.  For better visibility through barrier blocks.
1.  For builders who need a clear view while working with barriers.
1.  For server creators who use barriers as borders and want to reduce eye strain.

**This resource pack does not make invisible barrier blocks always visible — it is designed for a very specific use case.**

**This is what it looks like:**
![Preview](https://i.imgur.com/lkK4WwR.gif)
